# Change Request Form (Template)

Used any time a client asks for something beyond the signed [`StatementOfWork.md`](StatementOfWork.md) — protects both sides from silent scope creep.

---

**Project:** [Name]
**SOW reference:** [SOW #]
**Date requested:**
**Requested by:** [Client contact]

## What's being requested
[Plain description of the new/changed requirement]

## Why it's outside the current SOW
[Quote the specific SOW scope line this falls outside of]

## Impact
| | Original SOW | With this change |
|---|---|---|
| Price | £ | £ |
| Timeline | | |

## Decision
- [ ] Approved — proceed, invoice for the difference per the price above
- [ ] Declined — remains out of scope for this project, logged for a future phase
- [ ] Deferred — revisit after current milestone

**Client sign-off:** _______________________ **Date:** _______
**Aegis sign-off:** _______________________ **Date:** _______
